task_completion.description: Navigate to the File Upload settings in the administration panel.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Rocket.Chat Administration workspace with the 'FileUpload' or 'File Upload' settings page open.

task_completion.description: Set the Maximum File Upload Size to 5,242,880 bytes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Maximum File Upload Size (in bytes)' input field contains the exact value '5242880'.

task_completion.description: Set the Accepted Media Types to the required MIME types.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Accepted Media Types' input field contains exactly 'image/jpeg,image/png,image/gif,application/pdf,text/plain'.
The toggle or checkbox for 'Protect Uploaded Files' is in the enabled/active state.

task_completion.description: Announce the new policy in the #general channel.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A message sent by the admin is visible in the #general channel chat history mentioning the 5 MB limit, images, and PDFs.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Rocket.Chat web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the Rocket.Chat UI, rather than terminal windows executing API commands or scripts.

integrity.description: The announcement was posted in the actual chat application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The announcement message is visible in the Rocket.Chat #general channel interface, not just typed into a text editor or terminal.

integrity.description: The settings modifications were genuinely applied in the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The settings are entered into the actual Rocket.Chat admin form fields, and there is evidence of saving (e.g., clicking a 'Save changes' button) rather than just inspecting elements.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected Maximum File Upload Size is exactly 5242880 bytes. The Accepted Media Types must be exactly 'image/jpeg,image/png,image/gif,application/pdf,text/plain'. 'Protect Uploaded Files' must be enabled. For the announcement in #general, the system verifier checks for size keywords ('5mb', '5 mb', or '5 megabyte'), image keywords ('image', 'jpg', or 'png'), and 'pdf'. Note: The system verifier ignores the 'text' keyword for the announcement, so do not penalize if 'text' is missing from the chat message as long as the other keywords are present.
